subject: little email gift from all my heart!
body:
Why would food taste good?
  Why would sex feel good?
Everything points to certain things.Life is about being Happy!
  I am very appreciative for You Dear Jeffrey that you gave me opportunity to feel your happyness,and i realise that
  Life is about being happy! I wish you all the best with big big love! 
  Many kisses, many hugs! 
  Happy birhday!   
  Simona.
_________________________________________________________________
Helping your favorite cause is as easy as instant messaging. You IM, we give.
